chat_history.content: Phase 1 — district skeleton for Angkor (around 1117). A detailed map narrative will follow in the background while we build.

scenario.description: Capital of the Khmer Empire. Largest pre-industrial city in the world. Temple-mountains and vast water management systems.
scenario.features: Angkor Wat, Angkor Thom, Bayon temple, Ta Prohm, vast barays (reservoirs), moats, causeways, laterite and sandstone construction
scenario.grid_note: Flat terrain with water features dominating. Angkor Wat in the south (moated). Angkor Thom (walled city) in the north. Barays to the east.
scenario.ruler: Research who ruled and what the city looked like at this exact time
